```{r}
  scale_fill_manual(values = custom_colors_hp_long) +  # Change the palette to suit your preferences
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors_hp_long) +
  labs(x = "AD Status",
       y = "Local Efficiency",
       fill = "AD Status") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.margin = margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 50, l = 10),
        axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black"),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +  # Increase bottom margin
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +  # Prevents clipping of points at the bottom
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = list(c("Healthy_follow-up", "Preclinical_follow-up")),
                     method = "wilcox.test", p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format",
                     step.increase = 0.1, # Helps prevent label overlap
                     size = 6, #adjusted p-value label size
                     show.legend = FALSE) 
ggsave("Extended_Fig_5D_local_effiency_follow-up.pdf", plot = bp_last_efficiency, bg = "transparent", width = 10, height = 8)
```

Figure 5E: Longitudinal guild abundance stability
```{r}
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
long_guild_metadata <- read_excel("~/Documents/GitHub/PreclinicalAD_GutMicrobiome-Inflammation/R/Data/SupplementaryTable1_final.xlsx")

stability_cohort <- read_excel("~/Documents/GitHub/PreclinicalAD_GutMicrobiome-Inflammation/R/Data/GM_longitudinal_stability_samples.xlsx")
stability_cohort_ids <- unique(union(stability_cohort$Sample_ID1, stability_cohort$Sample_ID2))

long_guild_meta_filt <- long_guild_metadata %>% filter(Sample_ID %in% stability_cohort_ids)
long_guild_meta_filt$Diabetes <- as.factor(long_guild_meta_filt$Diabetes)
long_guild_meta_filt$Hypertension <- as.factor(long_guild_meta_filt$Hypertension)
options(na.action='na.fail')
columns_to_check <- c("guild_abundance", "AD_Status", "Sex", "Age", "BMI", "Diabetes", "Hypertension", "apoe4_carriage", "Time_diff_from_baseline_mo")
long_guild_meta_filt <- long_guild_meta_filt %>%
  filter(if_all(all_of(columns_to_check), ~ !is.na(.)))

model <- lmer(guild_abundance ~ AD_Status+ Sex + Age + BMI+ Diabetes+ Hypertension + apoe4_carriage+ Time_diff_from_baseline_mo + (1|ID), data = long_guild_meta_filt)
null_model <- lmer(guild_abundance ~ Sex + Age + BMI+ Diabetes+ Hypertension + apoe4_carriage+ Time_diff_from_baseline_mo + (1|ID), data = long_guild_meta_filt)


# View results
summary(model)

# Get p-values
anova(model, null_model) 
write.csv(anova(model, null_model), "~/Downloads/260406_MTG_long_guild_abund_hp_lmm_anova.csv")
write.csv(as.data.frame(summary(model)$coefficients), "~/Downloads/260406_MTG_long_guild_abund_time_from_baseline_lmm.csv")

p_long_guild_timediff_hp <- ggplot(long_guild_meta_filt, aes(x = Time_diff_from_baseline_mo, y = guild_abundance, color = AD_Status, group = ID)) +
  geom_point() +  # Add points
  geom_line(linetype = "dashed") +   # Connect points belonging to the same ID +
  geom_smooth(aes(group = AD_Status), method = "lm", se = TRUE) +  # Add a linear regression line with confidence intervals
  scale_color_manual(values = custom_colors_hp) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(long_guild_meta_filt$time_from_baseline_mo), by = 6)) +  # Set x-axis breaks at every 6 months
  labs(x = "Time difference from baseline sample (Months)", 
       y = "Guild abundance",
       color = "AD Status") +  # Label the axes and legend
  theme_minimal() +  # Use a minimal theme for a clean look
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 16),       # Set general font size
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18), # Axis titles font size
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),  # Axis labels font size
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16), # Legend title font size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),  # Legend labels font size
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"), # Optional: Add a title with larger font size
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 18) # Optional: Add subtitle with a larger font size
  )
ggsave("~/Documents/260401_MTG_long_guild_abund_timediff_from_baseline_hp.pdf", plot = p_long_guild_timediff_hp,bg = "transparent", width = 10, height = 8)


```
